changes.summary: BC-03 PublicationPersistencePort (unchanged from attempt 1): snapshot boundary, full PublicationService operation surface.
BC-01 CommunityPersistencePort (unchanged from attempt 1): CommunitySnapshot and port-local types, full CommunityService communityModel operation surface.
Mongoose publication document ↔ PublicationSnapshot mapper (sole publication mapper location).
Mongoose community document ↔ CommunitySnapshot mapper (sole community mapper location).
PublicationPersistenceAdapter implements PublicationPersistencePort; owns all Mongoose publication queries/updates/cascades moved from PublicationService.
CommunityPersistenceAdapter implements CommunityPersistencePort; owns all Mongoose community CRUD/list/membership/investment persistence moved from CommunityService.
Registers publication/community Mongoose schemas and binds PUBLICATION_PERSISTENCE_PORT / COMMUNITY_PERSISTENCE_PORT providers.
Removed @InjectModel(Publication); injects PUBLICATION_PERSISTENCE_PORT and delegates all publication persistence to the port.
Removed @InjectModel(Community); injects COMMUNITY_PERSISTENCE_PORT and delegates all communityModel persistence to the port (user/wallet models unchanged).
Birzha publish orchestration uses PublicationPersistencePort.insertPublication instead of publicationModel.create.

verification.tsc: no errors in changed files (pre-existing TS5101 baseUrl deprecation only)

notes: Attempt 2 completes wallet-vote-style end-to-end wiring outside nominal write_set: adapters, mappers, PersistenceModule bindings, service port injection, and create/Birzha use-case persistence delegation. Other domain services still use @InjectModel(Publication) — deferred to p9-persistence-ports-remaining.
